summary: Iteration 2 testing for Fatima Hospital: new Site Media + Founders & Team admin managers, /api/upload + /api/files file storage, public About/Gallery rendering, and Gmail SMTP. All 40 backend pytest tests pass (24 previous + 16 new). All admin UI flows for Site Media and Founders & Team work (add/list/delete, image-URL + YouTube types). About page renders Meet the Founder section with seeded founder. Gallery falls back to static images when empty, and switches to dynamic Image + 'Video Gallery' (iframe) when media exist. Gmail SMTP shows 'EMAIL SENT' for appointment create.

minor.issue: Response JSON still uses '_id' instead of 'id' due to Pydantic v2 alias='_id' (carried over from iteration 1). Frontend handles both via id || _id fallback so non-blocking.

issues: React warning: 'A component is changing an uncontrolled input to be controlled' fired once when switching media type. Caused by mediaUrl state being reset to empty string then user typing — cosmetic dev warning only.

action_items: (Optional) Initialize mediaUrl/memberPhoto state to '' (not undefined) to suppress the React 'uncontrolled to controlled' warning on Site Media form.
(Carry-over from iteration 1) Make API responses expose 'id' instead of '_id' for REST consistency.
(Carry-over) App.js is now ~2745 lines — even more monolithic. Strongly consider splitting AdminPanel, MeetTheFounder, GalleryPage, AppointmentForm into separate files.
critical_code_review_comments: /api/upload correctly enforces auth (401 without cookie), stores file via Emergent object storage, persists metadata in db.files, returns {url, path}. /api/files/{path} returns image with correct content-type and Cache-Control header.
Media + TeamMember CRUD all properly guard write endpoints with get_current_user dependency. Public GETs work without auth.

Gmail SMTP confirmed working: backend log shows 'EMAIL SENT to info.fatimahospitals@gmail.com' for both Appointment Request Received (patient) and New Appointment (admin notify) on a fresh test request.
Gallery page correctly falls back to static images when media list is empty, and seamlessly transitions to dynamic image grid + Video Gallery (iframe) when media exist — verified end-to-end.
About page's MeetTheFounder section renders the seeded founder card with photo, role and bio. Iframe renders only when a youtube_url is provided (seeded founder has none — expected).
App.js file size grew to 2745 lines (was 2300). Repeated violation of >700 LOC guideline — should be modularized.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all flows: admin media/team, About founder, Gallery static + dynamic)

seed_data_creation: Pytest creates TEST_-prefixed media/team/appointments/enquiries/doctors/blogs and cleans them up in the same session. Playwright UI test created and deleted TEST_UI_Media, TEST_UI_Member, TEST_YT_Gallery, TEST_IMG_Gallery — all cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite split into two files: /app/backend/tests/test_hospital_api.py (auth/doctors/blogs/appointments/enquiries) and /app/backend/tests/test_media_team_upload.py (upload/media/team). Both run together via `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest backend/tests/ -v`. Admin login at /staff-portal (intentionally not linked in nav). Media type select values are 'image' and 'youtube' (not 'image_url'). Default seeded founder name is 'Dr. Founder Name' (placeholder). Gmail SMTP currently sends real emails — be mindful when creating many test appointments.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration.
